subcodes.first_line: O thou glorious branch of the blessed Tree! I supplicate and beseech the Most Glorious Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المجید من السدره المبارکه اتضرع و ابتهل الی الملکوت الابهی و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
